creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204847
Fix inhibit lock

This patch fixes inhibit (and uninhibit) locks, because by default it uses the org.gnome.ScreenSaver service (not available on Xfce session).

This patch [1] was approved (and merged) by upstream.

Moreover improve Makefile (USES= gl and add sysutils/consolekit2 as dependency).

[1] https://bugzilla.xfce.org/show_bug.cgi?id=15551
